top_signals: 🚨 Day 20 of Iran war — no ceasefire signals, energy infrastructure now primary target
🚨 Ras Laffan LNG facility (world's largest) extensively damaged by Iranian missiles
🚨 Brent hits $116 — approaching $120/barrel threshold, global gas prices surge
🚨 Saudi Arabia: "little trust that remained in Iran has been completely shattered"
🚨 Qatar expels Iranian military attachés — diplomatic break deepens
🚨 Israel strikes northern Iran for first time — geographic expansion
⚠️ Trump threatens to "massively blow up" Iran gas field if Qatar attacked again
⚠️ Saudi Arabia reserves right to military action against Iran
⚠️ Ukraine peace talks PAUSED due to Iran war — Russia benefits from oil surge

new: russia_ukraine: trump_deal_stalling (weight 3) — Kremlin says peace process fizzling as Trump focused on Iran
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: ~90 ships still crossing Hormuz per AP — blockade is selective (US/Israeli ships banned only), not total closure. Iran easing on non-aligned nations. Putin-Trump call today yielded no Ukraine breakthrough. Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire active Mar 18-23. ME military escalation continues with IRGC announcing Gulf energy infrastructure attacks.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes northern Iran for first time — geographic expansion of campaign
latest_news.text: Israeli military announces strikes in northern Iran for the first time since war began Feb 28. Campaign expanding southward.

latest_news.headline: Vessel hit by unknown projectile near Ras Laffan, Qatar
latest_news.text: UK Maritime Trade Operations confirms vessel hit 4nm east of Ras Laffan. Maritime danger expanding to commercial shipping.

latest_news.headline: Brent crude hits $116, global gas prices surge after Ras Laffan damage
latest_news.text: Oil climbs to $116/barrel. European gas prices surge. Ras Laffan handles ~20% of global LNG supply.

latest_news.headline: Kuwait thwarts Hezbollah terror cell targeting critical infrastructure
latest_news.text: Kuwait arrests 10 citizens affiliated with Hezbollah plotting attacks on infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: DNI Gabbard accused of altering Senate testimony on Iran threat assessment
latest_news.text: Gabbard allegedly omitted intelligence details contradicting Trump's claims Iran posed imminent nuclear threat.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 09:04 UTC) — (1) Israel expands strikes to northern Iran for first time; (2) Ras Laffan LNG facility (world's largest) extensively damaged by Iranian missiles; (3) Vessel struck near Ras Laffan — commercial shipping now at risk; (4) Brent at $116, approaching $120 threshold; (5) Qatar expels Iranian military attachés; (6) Saudi Arabia says 'trust completely shattered,' reserves military action; (7) Trump threatens to blow up Iran's gas fields; (8) No ceasefire signals in any active theater.
